user.title: Cellcom Energy — Connect Account
user.description:
## How to connect your Cellcom Energy account

**Step 1 — Open Cellcom login page in your browser:**
[Click here to open Cellcom login](https://cellcom.co.il/Authentication/otp-login-page/)

**Step 2 — Open the browser console (F12 → Console tab) and paste:**
```
{snippet}
```
You will see: *[Cellcom Energy] Interceptor active — now log in normally.*

**Step 3 — Log in normally** with your phone number and SMS code.

**Step 4 — After login succeeds**, a dialog will appear with your tokens. Copy the entire text and paste it below.

data_description.tokens_json: The JSON text that appeared in the dialog after logging in (starts with {"accessToken":...})

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach Cellcom servers. Check your internet connection.
error.invalid_tokens_json: The pasted text is not valid. Make sure you copied the full text from the dialog (it should start with {"accessToken":...).
error.no_energy_account: No Cellcom Energy (electricity) account was found for this login. Make sure you have an active electricity account with Cellcom.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. See the HA log for details.

abort.already_configured: This Cellcom Energy account is already configured.
